title: Tangy Flaky Greek Palm Sugar Crumble
description: A tangy and flaky vegan-friendly meal-prep dish featuring palm sugar, designed to be enjoyed as a breakfast or snack option.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons grated palm sugar
ingredients.notes: ensure it's vegan-friendly if using palm sugar from sugarcane plant, otherwise replace with agave nectar or maple syrup

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup almond milk or any non-dairy milk alternative

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine Greek yogurt, palm sugar, lemon juice, sea salt, and optional lime juice. Stir in almond milk.
Add cornstarch to the mixture; mix well until no lumps remain.
Heat softened butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Pour yogurt mixture into the pan and cook for about 2 minutes or until thickened slightly, stirring frequently to avoid sticking.
Fold in vanilla extract, coconut flakes (if using), and stir until fully combined.

Transfer crumble mixture onto baking sheets lined with parchment paper and let it cool completely before refrigerating. For meal prep, portion out into freezer-safe containers or individual portions for easy grab-and-go.
